x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service-to-CI associations are the data foundation for Now Assist ITOM impact analysis. Low association counts mean Now Assist cannot determine which CIs support which services.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Map business services to CIs via svc_ci_assoc_list.do or by running Service Mapping. Ensure all business-critical services have CI associations. Without service-to-CI associations, Now Assist ITOM cannot determine which services are affected during incident response.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4e
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Service-to-CI associations are the data foundation for Now Assist ITOM impact analysis. Low association counts mean Now Assist cannot determine which CIs support which services.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Service-to-CI Relationship Coverage</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('svc_ci_assoc');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' service-to-CI associations defined';

    if (count >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' service-to-CI associations. Now Assist ITOM can accurately determine which services are affected by CI-level incidents.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' service-to-CI associations (target: 100+). Now Assist ITOM impact analysis will be limited to services with defined CI associations.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Fewer than 10 service-to-CI associations. Without these, Now Assist ITOM cannot determine which services are affected by CI events during incident response.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITOM</module>
<number>CHK0005992</number>
<order>140</order>
<remediation_guidance>Map business services to CIs via svc_ci_assoc_list.do or by running Service Mapping. Ensure all business-critical services have CI associations. Without service-to-CI associations, Now Assist ITOM cannot determine which services are affected during incident response.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4e</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
